zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie de Lusignan Countess of Eu於大約1223年出生在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易英德易素度時，她的父親Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes29歲，母親Yolande de Dreux29歲。她和Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1260年10月1日在法國波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯梅勒享年38歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie de Lusignan Countess of Eu于大约1223年出生在法国崔-瓦爾 德 洛易英德易素度时，她的父亲Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes29岁，母亲Yolande de Dreux29岁。她和Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1260年10月1日在法国波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯梅勒享年38岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lusignan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Andre, Francois, Lucien, Marcel.
French: habitational name from Lusignan, a place in Vienne. This surname is very rare in France. Compare   Zeno  .

History: Jean Miel (or Amiel) dit Lusignan from Lusignan in Vienne, France, married Marie-Thérèse Latouche in Boucherville, QC, in 1699. — A French family called (de) Lusignan became enormously powerful in the eastern Mediterranean during the Middle Ages. Guy de Lusignan (1129–94) was king of Cyprus from 1192 to 1194 (and before that, by right of marriage, king of the crusader state of Jerusalem). Hugues de Lusignan was king of Cyprus from 1267 to 1284 and king of Jerusalem from 1268 to 1284. During the 14th century, Lusignans became kings of the Armenian kingdom of Cilicia (on the Mediterranean coast of what is now Turkey, facing Cyprus).

variants.name: Zeno
meanings: Italian (mainly southern Italy), Hispanic (mainly Puerto Rico), and African American: from the personal name Zeno, classical Greek Zēnōn, a derivative of Zeus, the name of the king of the gods in Greek mythology. Zeno or Zenone is the name of a 4th-century Italian saint from Verona. As an African American name it was probably adopted in honor of the Stoic philosopher Zeno of Kition.

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie de Lusignan Countess of Eu was born about 1223, in Issoudun, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, France, her father, Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes, was 29 and her mother, Yolande de Dreux, was 29. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne. She died on 1 October 1260, in Melle, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France, at the age of 38, and was buried in Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie de Lusignan Countess of Eu est née environ 1223, à Issoudun, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, France, son père, Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Yolande de Dreux, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne. Elle est décédée le 1 octobre 1260, à Melle, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France.

de.Issoudun, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, Fr: Issoudun, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Marie de Lusignan Countess of Eu um 1223 in Issoudun, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes 29 und ihre Mutter Yolande de Dreux 29. Sie hatte mit Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Oktober 1260 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Melle, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich und wurde in Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne. ja.lifeSummary: Marie de Lusignan Countess of Euが約1223年にフランスセントレ-ヴァル ド ロイアーインダーイソウダンで生まれた時，父Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînesは29歳，母Yolande de Dreuxは29歳であった。彼女はGrand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienneとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1260年10月1日にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツデウクス-スevレスメルで38歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメにて埋葬された。

ko.Issoudun, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, Fr: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 인드르 이소우던
ko.lifeSummary: Marie de Lusignan Countess of Eu(이)가 대략 1223년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 인드르 이소우던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Yolande de Dreux(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1260년 10월 1일 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 데우스-스e브레스 멜에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Lusignan Countess of Eu nasceu aproximadamente 1223, em Issoudun, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, França, seu pai, Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Yolande de Dreux, tinha 29 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne. Ela faleceu em 1 de outubro de 1260, em Melle, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, França, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França.

ru.Issoudun, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, Fr: иссоудун, индр, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie de Lusignan Countess of Eu родилась около 1223 г. в местности иссоудун, индр, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Yolande de Dreux, 29. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne. Она умерла 1 октября 1260 г. в местности мелл, деукс-сeвресь, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности сине-маритим, норманди, Франция.
